productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Kendall Black Grey Floater
description: & amp amp amp amp nbspGet ready to go out and explore in style in these Kendall floaters from adidas. Designed for comfort, they look great when teamed with cargo shorts and tees.Upper Synthetic uppers for durability and strengthVelcro strap closures on the forefoot and ankle for snug FitSlightly padded lining for extra comfortEmbossed logo name on the forefoot and behind collar for style Midsole Foam footbed with elevated ridge pattern for stimulation of the sole and all-day comfort Outsole TPR outsole with strategic multi-directional placement for better grip and durability    shoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
